summary: Completed testing of CUBE-based Power BI style Stock Dashboard refactor. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend: All cube-based cross-filter features working - local filtering instant (<1s), selection chips appear/reset correctly, bar filters trigger backend calls, Detalle de Stock shows filtered data with modelo normalization.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (th/span/tr nesting) - cosmetic but should be addressed for clean React rendering

passed_tests: Backend: /cube returns ~11K aggregated rows with compact keys (t,m,lq,c,z,q)
Backend: /cube KPIs include total_stock=44895, modelos=703, variantes=6143, tiendas=6
Backend: /cube modelo_base normalization - LQ suffixes stripped (VANDROS-LQ → VANDROS)
Backend: /cube returns TOP 300 modelos without modelo filter
Backend: /cube accepts bar filters (marca=BOOSH reduces to 1567 stock, 9 modelos)
Backend: /cube lq=yes/no params work (not es_lq=si/no)
Backend: /cube negro=yes filter includes carbon/grafito colors
Backend: /detail returns paginated items with total count
Backend: /detail includes modelo and modelo_raw fields for normalization comparison
Backend: /detail accepts sel_modelo, sel_talla, sel_color, sel_tienda params
Backend: /detail combines bar filters with selection params
Backend: /filter-options-v2 returns all filter option arrays
Backend: /filter-options-v2 uses lq=yes/no params (not es_lq=si/no)
Backend: /filter-options-v2 uses negro=yes/no params
Backend: /filter-options-v2 cascade works (marca=BOOSH reduces other options)
Backend: Tallas sorted correctly (numeric then S/M/L order)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with cube data (300 modelo rows, 7 store panels, 12 talla columns)
Frontend: LOCAL cross-filter click on modelo - instant update (<1s), no spinner
Frontend: Selection chips appear in blue bar (SELECCIÓN: Modelo: X)
Frontend: 'Reset selección' button clears selection but keeps bar filters
Frontend: Bar filter cascade works (Marca=BOOSH reduces to 108 modelos, 1785 stock)
Frontend: KPIs update with selections (local) and bar filters (backend)
Frontend: Detalle de Stock opens with filtered data (13398 rows unfiltered)
Frontend: Detalle shows modelo normalization (ABANTO-LQ → ABANTO in Raw column)
Frontend: CSV export button present and functional
action_items: MINOR: Fix React hydration warnings - span elements inside thead/tr/tbody causing warnings (cosmetic)
critical_code_review_comments: React table structure has hydration warnings due to span wrappers inside thead/tbody - not breaking but should be cleaned up
model_base regex normalization working correctly for LQ suffix stripping
Cube response uses compact keys (t,m,lq,c,z,q) - good for performance
context_for_next_testing_agent: CUBE-based Power BI refactor complete. Key values: Unfiltered cube=~11K rows, 300 distinct modelos (TOP 300), 44,895 total stock, 703 total modelos. NEW endpoints: /cube (pre-aggregated data), /detail (paginated with sel_* params), /filter-options-v2 (cascade with lq/negro=yes/no). Frontend stores cube in memory for LOCAL cross-filtering (no API calls on click). Selection state separate from bar filter state. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_cube_dashboard.py covers all cube/detail/filter-options-v2 functionality.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No critical issues found. All features working correctly.
